label: hobbies_and_activities
value: Turned the garage into a full-fledged home brewing setup with extra fermentation tanks and temperature control, interested in trying new recipes and techniques, seeking advice on avoiding common mistakes in mixed fermentation.

label: professional_details
value: Interested in certifications and professional development programs to advance towards a supervisory role, specifically in IoT and data analytics. Notable certifications include Cisco Certified Internetwork Expert (CCIE) - Data Center, Certified IoT Professional (CIoTP), IBM Certified Data Engineer - Big Data, Google Cloud Professional Data Engineer, and AWS Certified Solutions Architect - Associate. Also considering Lean Six Sigma Certification, Project Management Professional (PMP), and industry-specific training.

label: plans_and_intentions
value: Planning a board game night for about 8 friends.

label: health_and_wellness_preferences
value: Interested in creative activities to unwind after work, including classic car restoration, DIY crafts, photography, gardening, cooking, music, writing, art classes, mindfulness, and outdoor activities.
